news.headline: Forum Energy Technologies reported $201M revenue, $190M orders in Q4 2024, $92M operating cash flow, and $135M net loss for 2024.
news.summary: Houston-based company Forum Energy Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:FET) reported a fourth quarter revenue of $201 million in 2024 alongside receiving orders totaling $190 million. The quarter also saw a net loss of $104 million, primarily due to a $119 million non-cash intangible asset impairment and an $11 million tax valuation allowance release. The total net loss for 2024 was $135 million, translating to $11.00 per diluted share. Adjusted net loss figures reveal $6 million for the quarter and $11 million for the full year 2024. Neal Lux, the President and Chief Executive Officer, emphasized these results.

news.headline: Hyzon Motors to delist from NASDAQ and deregister with SEC, focused on zero-emission technology.
news.summary: In Bolingbrook, Illinois on February 20, 2025, Hyzon Motors Inc. announced that it is a U.S.-based company specializing in high-performance hydrogen fuel cell systems. Hyzon is dedicated to delivering zero-emission power to help industries transition to cleaner energy solutions.

news.headline: Cohen & Steers, Inc. announces $0.62 per share dividend for Q1 2025, 5.1% increase from last quarter's $0.59.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 20, 2025, Cohen & Steers, Inc. (NYSE: CNS) reported that its Board of Directors has approved a cash dividend of $0.62 per common stock share for the first quarter of 2025. This marks a significant 5.1% rise from the previous quarter's dividend of $0.59 per share. This decision highlights the company's commitment to rewarding its shareholders.

news.headline: Booking Holdings reported Q4 revenue of $5.47 billion (beat estimates of $5.18 billion) and EPS of $41.55 (beat $35.89). Total revenue was up 14% YoY, with $700 million in operating cash flow. Shares increased post report.
news.summary: Booking Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:BKNG) released its Q4 financial results exceeding expectations. The company reported $5.47 billion in revenue, surpassing analyst projections of $5.18 billion. Adjusted earnings were $41.55 per share, higher than the estimated $35.89 per share. Total revenue rose by 14% YoY, with a 13% increase in room nights and a 17% climb in gross bookings. Operating cash flow reached around $700 million. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: COPT Defense raises quarterly dividend by 3.4% to $0.305 per share for Q1 2025, up from $0.295. Annualized amount now $1.22. Payable on April 16.
news.summary: In Columbia, Maryland, COPT Defense Properties (NYSE: CDP) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.305 per common share for the first quarter, ending March 31, 2025. This marks a 3.4% increase from the previous quarter's $0.295 dividend. The dividend for Q1 2025 amounts to $1.22 per share annually and will be paid on April 16, 2025, to shareholders.

news.headline: Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund secures $175 million revolving credit facility, matures in 2026.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Houston-based Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund, Inc. announced securing a new unsecured revolving credit facility totaling $175 million, listed under NYSE as KYN. The facility, set to mature on February 19, 2026, serves as a replacement to their previous $135 million credit facility that was due to mature the day after.

news.headline: MeridianLink to report Q4 and FY 2024 results on March 6, 2025, after market close.
news.summary: MeridianLink, a company based in Costa Mesa, California, has announced that it will be unveiling its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024 on Thursday, March 6, 2025, after the market closes. This information will provide insights into the company's performance and financial health during that period. Investors and stakeholders are eagerly awaiting this disclosure to assess the company's progress and profitability. Stay tuned for important updates on MeridianLink's financial status.

news.headline: Five9 achieved record revenue of $1 billion in 2024, with fourth quarter revenue hitting $278.7 million, a 17% increase from 2023.
news.summary: San Ramon-based Five9, Inc. (NASDAQ:FIVN), a leading provider of Intelligent CX Platform solutions, released its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024. In the fourth quarter of 2024, the company achieved a significant 17% increase in revenue, reaching an all-time high of $278.7 million, compared to $239.1 million in the same period in 2023. The GAAP gross margin for the fourth quarter of 2024 was reported at 56.0%, marking an improvement from the 52.9% recorded in the fourth quarter of 2023. Adjusted gross margin was also strengthened.

news.headline: Genesco to announce Q4 and FY2025 results on March 7, 2025, in Nashville, Tennessee.
news.summary: Genesco, a company based in Nashville, Tennessee, is set to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year of 2025. The report is scheduled to be released on March 7, 2025. Following the release, a conference call will be held to discuss the results. This update highlights the upcoming important information related to Genesco's financial performance and its plans for communicating those results to stakeholders.

news.headline: Frontier reports Q4 and full-year 2024 results, marking the end of turnaround post-bankruptcy, with detailed info available.
news.summary: Frontier Communications Parent, Inc. (NASDAQ: FYBR) announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company's CEO, Nick Jeffery, stated that 2024 was a significant year for Frontier, as it concluded a turnaround initiative that began after emerging from bankruptcy in 2021. Investors can access more details about the company's performance over the past year and the previous four years in its investor presentation. This announcement marks a pivotal moment for Frontier as it continues to progress following its bankruptcy reorganization.

news.headline: RingCentral appoints Kira Makagon as President and COO, responsible for product and sales. $rng.
news.summary: In Belmont, California, RingCentral, Inc. (NYSE: RNG), a renowned global provider of AI-driven business communication solutions, has named Kira Makagon as the President and Chief Operating Officer, effective immediately. Makagon, who previously served as the Chief Innovation Officer and CMO, will oversee the product and technology division, direct and channel sales teams, customer success initiatives, marketing efforts, and operational functions. This announcement follows the appointment by RingCentral's Founder and Chairman, Vlad Shmunis.

news.headline: Mastercard's EVP will present at Morgan Stanley Conference on March 5 in Purchase, NY.
news.summary: Johan Gerber, the Executive Vice President of security solutions at Mastercard, is scheduled to speak at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on March 5 in Purchase, New York.

news.headline: Docebo to attend investor conferences in March 2025: Scotiabank on March 4th, Morgan Stanley on March 6th, and Cantor on March 12th.
news.summary: In Toronto, AI-powered learning solutions leader Docebo Inc. (NASDAQ: DCBO, TSX: DCBO) shared news of its management team's upcoming presentations at key conferences in March 2025. The events include the 28th Annual Scotiabank TMT Conference on March 4th in Toronto, the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media, & Telecom Conference on March 6th in San Francisco, and the Cantor Global Technology Conference on March 12th in New York. For further details on these events and more, stay tuned for updates from Docebo Inc.

news.headline: Guidewire (NYSE: GWRE) to reveal Q2 fiscal yr 2025 results on March 6, 2025, with webcast at 2:00 p.m. PT (5:00 p.m. ET).
news.summary: Guidewire Corporation (NYSE: GWRE) has disclosed plans to unveil its financial performance for the fiscal quarter concluding on January 31, 2025, subsequent to market closure on Thursday, March 6, 2025. Executives will conduct an audio webcast at 2:00 p.m. PT (5:00 p.m. ET) on the same day to analyze and deliberate on the Company’s outcomes for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025. Interested parties can join the live audio webcast through the Investor Relations portal at https://ir.guidewire.com/.

news.headline: Copart's Q2 fiscal 2025: Revenue $1.16B, Gross profit $525.6M, Net income $387.4M; 14.0% revenue increase.
news.summary: Copart, Inc. (NASDAQ: CPRT) released its financial results for the quarter ending January 31, 2025. During this period, the company reported $1.16 billion in revenue, $525.6 million in gross profit, and $387.4 million in net income attributable to Copart, Inc. These figures indicate a revenue growth of $143.2 million (14.0%), a gross profit increase of $61.4 million (13.2%), and a net income rise of $61.8 million.

news.headline: Employers Holdings, Inc. reported Q4 2024 net income of $28.3 million ($1.14 per share) compared to $45.6 million ($1.77 per share). Full-Year 2024 net income was $118.6 million ($4.71 per share). Quarterly cash dividend of $0.30 per share declared.
news.summary: Employers Holdings, Inc. reported financial results for the fourth quarter ended December 31, 2024. Full-year 2024 highlights include a net income of $118.6 million, adjusted net income of $94.0 million, gross premiums written of $776.3 million, and a record of 130,767 ending policies in-force. Fourth quarter highlights include a net income of $28.3 million and gross premiums written of $176.3 million. CEO Katherine Antonello noted solid growth in premiums, strong investment performance, and focus on underwriting expenses. The company repurchased shares and declared a dividend. The company's book value per share increased by 9.8% in 2024. The company also provided information about their balance sheets, income statements, and return on equity. They will host a conference call on February 21, 2025, to discuss these results and provided a link for registration. The company operates in the workers' compensation insurance market and has subsidiaries that focus on small and mid-sized businesses.

news.headline: F&G Annuities & Life reported Q4 & full year 2024 results: net earnings of $622M for the year, increase in AUM to $65.3B & adjusted net earnings of $546M. Sales growth recorded at $15.3B for the year. Adjusted ROA increased to 1.06% and ROE to over 12% for the year. Capital returned to shareholders totaled $125M for 2024. Strong solvency reported with RBC ratio over 410% as of Dec. 31, 2024. Adjusted net earnings reflected asset growth and disciplined expense management. Debt to capitalization ratio at 27.5%. Earnings conference call scheduled for Feb. 21, 2025. Non-GAAP financial info provided. Forward-looking statements and risk factors discussed. Total investments at $60.1B as of Dec. 31, 2024. Goodwill increased to $2.18B, market risk benefits rose to $189M.
news.summary: F&G Annuities & Life, Inc. reported their financial results for Q4 and the full year ending December 31, 2024. Net earnings attributable to common shareholders were $323 million for Q4 and $622 million for the full year. Adjusted net earnings were $143 million for Q4 and $546 million for the full year. The company achieved record sales growth, with total gross sales of $15.3 billion for the year, a 16% increase from 2023. Assets under management were $53.8 billion at the end of the year. F&G returned $32 million and $125 million to shareholders in Q4 and the full year respectively. The estimated risk-based capital ratio was over 410% as of December 31, 2024. Adjusted ROA and ROE also saw improvements. F&G's CEO expressed optimism for 2025, citing strong momentum and growth opportunities. The company's conference call to discuss the results was scheduled for February 21, 2025. Overall, F&G showcased a robust financial performance with increases in various key metrics.

news.headline: Boise Cascade Co. reported Q4 net income of $68.9M on sales of $1.6B. Full year 2024 net income of $376.4M on sales of $6.7B.
news.summary: Boise Cascade Company, listed as BCC on the NYSE, announced a net income of $68.9 million for the fourth quarter, equivalent to $1.78 per share, with sales amounting to $1.6 billion. The company reported a net income of $376.4 million for the full year of 2024, translating to $9.57 per share, and sales totaling $6.7 billion. Detailed comparative results for 2023 can be found in the table below. Expressing appreciation for the dedication of their associates, the company shared these financial highlights as they wrap up the year 2024.

news.headline: FNF reported $450 million net earnings in Q4 2024, up from a loss in Q4 2023. F&G segment contributed $123 million. Total annual net earnings were $1.3 billion. Title Segment revenue was $2.0 billion in Q4 2024, a 23% increase from 2023. F&G reported $3.5 billion in gross sales for Q4. Common dividends paid were $141 million in Q4 and total assets stood at $95.4 billion. Adjusted net earnings per share were $1.34 for Q4.
news.summary: Fidelity National Financial, Inc., a provider of title insurance and transaction services, reported fourth quarter net earnings attributable to common shareholders of $450 million, or $1.65 per share, compared to a net loss of $69 million for the same period in 2023. Full year net earnings were $1.3 billion, or $4.65 per share, compared to $517 million for the year ended 2023. The Title Segment contributed $263 million for the fourth quarter and $877 million for the full year, while the F&G Segment contributed $123 million for the fourth quarter and $475 million for the full year. FNF's consolidated adjusted net earnings per share were $1.34 for the fourth quarter and $4.63 for the full year, with total revenue reaching $3.6 billion for the quarter and $13.7 billion for the year. F&G achieved record gross sales of $15.3 billion for the full year 2024, driving assets under management to $65.3 billion at the end of the fourth quarter, up 17% from 2023. Adjusted pre-tax title margin was 16.6% for the fourth quarter, reflecting the company's operational efficiencies and strong performance. Management remains positive about future growth prospects and financial stability.

news.headline: Decreased demand for long-term US Treasurys sparks concern. Is Bitcoin in danger?
news.summary: In new developments, it has been reported that the budget allocation for education in the upcoming fiscal year has been increased by 15%, reaching a total of $50 million. This increase is aimed at improving educational facilities and resources in schools across the country. Additionally, the government has announced a 10% raise in salary for all teachers, affecting over 100,000 educators nationwide. The goal of these initiatives is to enhance the quality of education and provide better support for both students and teachers.

news.headline: Musk's xAI impresses early Grok 3 users, receiving top scores.
Guild Holdings Company (NYSE: GHLD) to release Q4 and full-year 2024 earnings on March 6, 2025. Webcast and call at 5:00 p.m. ET.

news.summary: A real estate investment trust, Peakstone Realty Trust (NYSE: PKST), specializing in industrial assets, reported its financial outcomes for the quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2024. CEO Michael Escalante noted progress in aligning the portfolio towards industrial interests, with industrial ABR comprising close to 40% of total ABR. Throughout 2024, the company worked on implementing its strategic plan.

news.headline: Hudson Pacific Properties (NYSE: HPP) reports 20% increase in office leasing, 2.0 million sq ft activity in Q4 2024.
news.summary: Hudson Pacific Properties, Inc. (NYSE: HPP), known for offering real estate solutions to tech and media tenants, revealed its financial performance for Q4 2024. Victor Coleman, the Chairman and CEO, expressed satisfaction with the company concluding the year with office leasing up by almost 20% compared to the previous year, involving over 2.0 million square feet. Notably, the leasing pipeline is currently active.

news.headline: Comfort Systems USA (NYSE: FIX) reported Q4 2024 results: net income $145.9M, revenue $1.87B (up from $1.36B in 2023).
news.summary: Comfort Systems USA, Inc. (NYSE: FIX) announced its financial results for the quarter and year ending December 31, 2024. In Q4 2024, the company reported a net income of $145.9 million, translating to $4.09 per diluted share, an increase from $91.6 million, or $2.55 per diluted share, in Q4 2023. Total revenue for Q4 2024 was $1.87 billion, marking a significant rise from $1.36 billion in Q4 2023. Additionally, the company disclosed an operating cash flow of $2 billion during the period.

news.headline: In Q4 2024, Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. (NYSE: IVR) reported a net loss per common share of $0.09, down from a net income of $0.63 in Q3 2024.
news.summary: Atlanta-based company Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. (NYSE: IVR) revealed their financial performance for the quarter ending on December 31, 2024. They reported a significant shift from earning $0.63 per share in Q3 of 2024 to a loss of $0.09 per common share. This change in net income has had an impact on the earnings available for distribution, marking a notable fluctuation for the organization.

news.headline: RE/MAX Holdings reports Fourth Quarter 2024 revenue of $72.5M and Adjusted EBITDA of $23.3M, a 5.4% decrease from Q4 2023.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, there were significant financial highlights reported. The total revenue for this period stood at $72.5 million, reflecting a decline of 5.4% compared to the same quarter in 2023. The Adjusted EBITDA for the fourth quarter was $23.3 million. news.headline: Medical staffing agency AMN Healthcare discloses Q4 and full year 2024 financial performance.
news.summary: An announcement made today reported that the global market for electric vehicles is projected to reach a valuation of $802 billion by the year 2027, showing a compound annual growth rate of 22.6% during the forecast period. The rise in demand for clean energy and the implementation of stringent government regulations promoting the use of electric vehicles are some of the key factors driving this market growth. Additionally, the Asia-Pacific region is expected to witness significant growth in the electric vehicle market due to factors such as increasing population, rising disposable income, and rapid urbanization. The shift towards sustainable transportation alternatives is also contributing to the growing adoption of electric vehicles worldwide.

news.headline: F&G Annuities & Life, Inc. (NYSE: FG) reports Q4 and full-year 2024 results in Des Moines, Iowa.
news.summary: F&G Annuities & Life, Inc. (NYSE: FG), headquartered in Des Moines, Iowa, revealed its latest financial data on February 20, 2025. F&G, a prominent player in insurance offerings for retail annuity, life customers, and institutional clients, shared its earnings for both the fourth quarter and the entire year.
